CVE-2015-0839.title: The hp-plugin utility in HP Linux Imaging and Printing (HPLIP) ma ...
CVE-2015-0839.description: The hp-plugin utility in HP Linux Imaging and Printing (HPLIP) makes it easier for man-in-the-middle attackers to execute arbitrary code by leveraging use of a short GPG key id from a keyserver to verify print plugin downloads.
